_units: weight in A, tau in s, delay in s
_note: tau_s1/tau_s2 now live here (used to be on the neuron). The cascade ODE runs on the Synapses object — see msn_synapse.py.

exc._note: Excitatory — writes I_exc_post of target MSN via summed cascade

inh._note: Inhibitory — writes I_inh_post of target MSN via summed cascade
inh._wta_tuning: 20 µA: at ~50 Hz and tau_s=47ms gives steady-state 20 µA suppression
